texto: The people of Nicaragua were suffering oppression. This made us develop an awareness which eventually led us to commit ourselves to the struggle against the domination of the capitalists of our country in collusion with the U.S. government, i.e. imperialism.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Daniel Ortega sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “The people of Nicaragua were suffering oppression. This made us develop an awareness which eventu…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, struggle, suffering, útil em momentos de suffering e people.
